languages.text:
At the start of his first turn in combat, the Chronomancer automatically uses {g|f:100829bd43eb4b0285906a77fb6fb61b}Obelisk Protection{/g}. After that, starting from the next turn, he starts casting {g|f:43d5df84c9784721a5fefdcb512bd5d6}Obelisk Overcharge{/g}.
Upon the Chronomancer's defeat, all Necron obelisks are destroyed.

At the start of their first turn in combat, the Chronomancer always uses {g|f:100829bd43eb4b0285906a77fb6fb61b}Obelisk Protection{/g}. After that, starting from the next turn, they start casting {g|f:43d5df84c9784721a5fefdcb512bd5d6}Obelisk Hyperphase{/g}.
When the Chronomancer is killed, all Necron obelisks will be destroyed.

languages.text:
В начале своего первого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} хрономант всегда применяет {g|f:100829bd43eb4b0285906a77fb6fb61b}Фазовую защиту{/g}. Со следующего хода он начинает активировать {g|f:43d5df84c9784721a5fefdcb512bd5d6}Гиперфазу обелисков{/g}.
При уничтожении хрономанта все обелиски некронов также оказываются уничтожены.

При уничтожении хрономанта все обелиски некронов также оказываются уничтожены.

languages.text:
Zu Beginn seines ersten {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} im Kampf nutzt der Chronomant immer {g|f:100829bd43eb4b0285906a77fb6fb61b}Obeliskschutz{/g}. Ab dem nächsten Zug setzt er zu Beginn des Zuges {g|f:43d5df84c9784721a5fefdcb512bd5d6}Obelisken-Hyperphase{/g} ein.
Wird der Chronomant getötet, werden alle Necron-Obelisken zerstört.

languages.text:
Al comienzo de su primer {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} en combate, el Cronomante siempre usa {g|f:100829bd43eb4b0285906a77fb6fb61b}Protección del obelisco{/g}. Después, a partir del siguiente turno, empieza a lanzar {g|f:43d5df84c9784721a5fefdcb512bd5d6}Hiperfase del obelisco{/g}.
Cuando el Cronomante muera, se destruirán todos los obeliscos necrones.

traits.locale_text:
Al comienzo de su primer {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} en combate, el Cronomante siempre usa {g|f:100829bd43eb4b0285906a77fb6fb61b}Protección del obelisco{/g}. Después, a partir del siguiente turno, empieza a lanzar {g|f:43d5df84c9784721a5fefdcb512bd5d6}Hiperfase del obelisco{/g}.
Cuando el Cronomante muera, se destruirán todos los obeliscos necrones.

languages.text:
Kronobaz, çatışmadaki ilk {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} başlangıcında her daim {g|f:100829bd43eb4b0285906a77fb6fb61b}Dikili Taş Koruması{/g} kullanır. Ardından bir sonraki turdan başlayarak {g|f:43d5df84c9784721a5fefdcb512bd5d6}Dikili Taş Hiperevresi{/g} yapmaya başlar.
Kronobaz öldüğünde tüm Nekron dikili taşları imha olur.
languages.original_text:
At the start of their first {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} in combat, the Chronomancer always uses {g|f:100829bd43eb4b0285906a77fb6fb61b}Obelisk Protection{/g}. After that, starting from the next turn, they start casting {g|f:43d5df84c9784721a5fefdcb512bd5d6}Obelisk Hyperphase{/g}.
When the Chronomancer is killed, all Necron obelisks will be destroyed.

traits.locale_text:
Kronobaz, çatışmadaki ilk {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} başlangıcında her daim {g|f:100829bd43eb4b0285906a77fb6fb61b}Dikili Taş Koruması{/g} kullanır. Ardından bir sonraki turdan başlayarak {g|f:43d5df84c9784721a5fefdcb512bd5d6}Dikili Taş Hiperevresi{/g} yapmaya başlar.
Kronobaz öldüğünde tüm Nekron dikili taşları imha olur.

languages.text:
在其战斗中的首个{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，编时匠会使用{g|f:100829bd43eb4b0285906a77fb6fb61b}方尖碑的庇护{/g}。之后，从下一个回合开始，编时匠会释放{g|f:43d5df84c9784721a5fefdcb512bd5d6}方尖碑超相位{/g}。
编时匠死亡时，所有的太空死灵方尖碑都会被摧毁。
languages.original_text:

When the Chronomancer is killed, all Necron obelisks will be destroyed.

traits.locale_text:
在其战斗中的首个{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，编时匠会使用{g|f:100829bd43eb4b0285906a77fb6fb61b}方尖碑的庇护{/g}。之后，从下一个回合开始，编时匠会释放{g|f:43d5df84c9784721a5fefdcb512bd5d6}方尖碑超相位{/g}。
编时匠死亡时，所有的太空死灵方尖碑都会被摧毁。

languages.text:
Au début de son premier {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} au combat, le chronomancien utilise toujours {g|f:100829bd43eb4b0285906a77fb6fb61b}Protection d'obélisque{/g}. Ensuite, à partir de son tour suivant, il lance {g|f:43d5df84c9784721a5fefdcb512bd5d6}Hyperphase d'obélisque{/g}.
À la mort du chronomancien, tous les obélisques nécrons sont détruits.

À la mort du chronomancien, tous les obélisques nécrons sont détruits.

languages.text:
戦闘開始時にクロノマンサーは必ず{g|f:100829bd43eb4b0285906a77fb6fb61b}オベリスク・プロテクション{/g}を使用し、その後、次の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}から{g|f:43d5df84c9784721a5fefdcb512bd5d6}オベリスク・ハイパーフェイズ{/g}を唱え始める。
クロノマンサーが倒されると、ネクロンのオベリスクは全て破壊される。
